h1: Custom Coolers for Branded Promotions & Events
metaDescription: Order custom coolers for events, giveaways, and employee gifts. Wide selection of backpack, tote, and hard coolers. Fast turnaround. Get a quote today.
introHtml:
Summer is here, and so is the season of outdoor events, company picnics, and trade shows. Keep your brand top of mind with custom coolers that attendees and employees will actually use. From beach days to tailgates, a branded cooler is a practical giveaway that offers repeated exposure for your logo or message.

Our collection includes backpack coolers for hiking commuters, insulated totes for grocery runs, and hard coolers for job sites or weekend camping trips. The Hybrid 2-in-1 Cooler functions as both a cooler and a seat, while the Ice River Seat Cooler adds portability for sports fans. Each product can be decorated with screen print, embroidery, or full-color print to match your brand colors.

Minimum order quantities vary by style, but we offer options for small businesses as well as large corporate orders. Need samples? Order a single unit to check quality before committing. Our team will help you choose the right cooler for your audience and budget. Request a quote today or browse our standard inventory for quick shipment.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom coolers?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities (MOQs) vary by cooler style. For example, many backpack coolers and insulated totes have MOQs of 50 to 100 units, while larger hard coolers may require as few as 10 units. We also offer no-minimum sample orders so you can evaluate quality before placing a bulk order.

faqs.q: What decoration methods are available for coolers?
faqs.a: Most coolers can be screen printed or embroidered with your logo. Some styles, like the 25L Cooler- Full Color, support full-color digital print for detailed artwork. We recommend screen printing for simple logos and embroidery for a premium feel on fabric coolers.

faqs.q: How long does production take for custom coolers?
faqs.a: Standard production lead time is 10-15 business days after artwork approval. Rush orders can be accommodated for an additional fee, with turnaround as fast as 5-7 business days. Shipping time depends on your location and chosen carrier.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample of a cooler before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes. We offer sample orders for any cooler in our catalog. Samples are typically shipped within 2-3 business days and can be ordered without a minimum. You can request a sample with or without decoration to test the product.

faqs.q: Are these coolers suitable for outdoor worksites?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Hard coolers like the Igloo® Terrain Cooler are rugged enough for construction sites, while the Hybrid 2-in-1 Cooler doubles as a seat for breaks. Insulated totes keep lunches cold for safety managers distributing heat-relief kits. All coolers are designed for durability and repeated use.

heroAltText: Custom coolers including backpack coolers, insulated totes, and hard coolers for brand promotion at outdoor events
